radtrack-layout_must_change_password-des: Local-password users and bootstrap admins must rotate passwords on first login.
radtrack-layout_password_updated: Password updated. Sign in again if prompted.
radtrack-login_description: Local login is app-owned. OIDC and trusted-header auth link back to local DB users.
radtrack-login_header_auth-description: Trusted reverse-proxy auth is enabled. If upstream auth already succeeded, refreshing this page should establish access automatically.
radtrack-dashboard_description: Uploads, datasets, and recent audit activity.
radtrack-datasets_field_inventory-descri: Fields exposed by accessible datalogs. These switches only affect what appears on the map screen.
radtrack-datasets_field_inventory_empty: No datalog fields are available yet.
radtrack-dataset_delete_confirm: Delete dataset "{$name}"? This removes every datalog, reading, and exclude area in it.
radtrack-dataset_field_inventory-descrip: Collapsed list of popup and metric fields in this dataset, including the datalogs that expose each key.
radtrack-dataset_field_inventory-empty: No datalog fields are available in this dataset yet.
radtrack-dataset_live_track_description: Live datalogs accept point ingestion through generated per-datalog API keys.
radtrack-dataset_tracks_empty: No datalogs have been added to this dataset yet.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_circle_center_r: Click the map or enter coordinates to set the circle center.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_circle_help: Click the map to set the center, then adjust the radius if needed.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_compress_help: Compress keeps a stable pseudo-random number of points inside the circle so dense home clusters are harder to infer.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_compress_invali: Compress max points must be greater than or equal to min points.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_circle_radius_r: Radius must be greater than zero.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_editor-descript: Click the map to set a circle center. Existing exclude areas stay visible on the map for reference.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_empty: No exclude areas have been added yet.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_polygon_help: Polygon mode: click the map to add each vertex in order.
radtrack-dataset_exclude_polygon_min_poi: A polygon exclude area needs at least three points.
radtrack-dataset_sharing_dataset_help: Dataset shares grant access to every datalog in this dataset.
radtrack-dataset_sharing_empty: This dataset is not shared with anyone yet.
radtrack-dataset_sharing_track_help: Datalog-level sharing is managed from each datalog page.
radtrack-map_description: Viewport-driven raw point and aggregate queries with dataset, time, metric, and exclusion filters.
radtrack-map_live_updates_absolute_note-: Live updates are disabled for fixed between-times filters. Use a recent "since" filter for live refresh.
radtrack-map_auto_cell_size-label: Auto detect cell size from zoom
radtrack-map_auto_scale-label: Auto scale low, mid, and high
radtrack-map_time_filter_absolute_requir: Choose both a start and end time.
radtrack-map_time_filter_relative_invali: Enter a positive whole number of hours or days.
radtrack-map_combined_datasets-help: Saved combined views from the Combined page.
radtrack-map_tracks_empty: No datalogs found for the selected datasets.
radtrack-map_tracks_require_dataset: Select one or more datasets to choose specific datalogs.
radtrack-map_points_modal_empty: No data points found for this cell.
radtrack-import_export_description: Choose between RadTrack JSON backup flows and RadiaCode file imports. More data types can be added here later.
radtrack-import_export_json-description: Export RadTrack data to JSON or import one or more exported JSON backup files.
radtrack-import_dataset_name_ignored-hel: Dataset name is ignored while every selected `.zrctrk` or `.zip` archive is being split into one dataset per datalog file.
radtrack-import_advanced_deduplication-l: Skip equivalent datalogs with advanced deduplication.
radtrack-import_advanced_deduplication-h: Uses normalized device and reading content so matching datalogs can be skipped even when the uploaded file bytes differ.
radtrack-import_processing-help: Upload complete. The server is processing the files now.
radtrack-import_split_bulk_datasets-labe: For `.zrctrk` and zip uploads, create one dataset per datalog file.
radtrack-import_split_bulk_datasets-help: Each resulting dataset is named from the datalog filename without its extension.
radtrack-import_warning_saved-note: Warning details are stored with this import batch summary.
radtrack-import_warning_summary-descript: {$count} warning sources in this import result.
radtrack-import_json_description: Upload one or more RadTrack export `.json` backup files. Files are processed sequentially using the current backend deduplication rules.
radtrack-import_json_drag_drop-label: Drag RadTrack export `.json` files here or pick them manually.
radtrack-import_json_dataset_name-help: Used only when an imported backup does not already include dataset names. Embedded backup metadata stays authoritative.
radtrack-import_json_invalid_file_type: Only RadTrack export `.json` files can be imported here.
radtrack-import_radiacode_description: Accepts `.rctrk`, bulk `.rctrk`, `.zip`, and `.zrctrk` files. Raw artifacts are archived in Postgres before parsing.
radtrack-import_radiacode_drag_drop-labe: Drag `.rctrk`, `.zrctrk`, or `.zip` files here or pick them manually.
radtrack-import_radiacode_invalid_file_t: Only `.rctrk`, `.zrctrk`, and `.zip` files can be imported here.
radtrack-export_description: JSON export for raw points, aggregates, or both, using the same access and exclusion rules as the map. Raw-point exports can be restored from the Import JSON page.
radtrack-export_datasets-help: Select one or more datasets to include in the export.
radtrack-export_combined_datasets-help: Optional saved combined views. Their member datasets are added to the export scope.
radtrack-export_metric-help: Choose which measurement aggregate summaries should focus on.
radtrack-export_raw_points-help: Include per-reading points after access rules and exclude-area handling are applied. Required for backup re-imports.
radtrack-export_aggregates-help: Include grouped cells instead of only individual readings. Aggregate-only exports cannot be restored from the Import JSON page.
radtrack-export_apply_exclude_areas-help: Respect dataset exclude areas so private regions stay filtered in the export.
radtrack-export_full_export-help: Include verbose parsed fields, null properties, warning flags, and empty extras. Larger files.
radtrack-export_aggregate_layout-help: Used only when aggregates are enabled. Hexagon, square, and circle choose the footprint of each aggregate cell, and the meter value controls how large each cell is.
radtrack-export_preview_empty: Run an export to preview the JSON envelope and metadata.
radtrack-export_preview_truncated: Preview truncated to the first {$chars} characters. The downloaded file still contains the full export.
radtrack-export_raw_capped: Raw points capped by export limit
radtrack-combined_description: Virtual combined views over datasets you can already access.
radtrack-users_description: Moderators can disable accounts and reset passwords. Admins can also create users and manage identities.
radtrack-users_disable_blocked_external_: OIDC and header-auth users cannot be disabled.
radtrack-admin_settings_description: Bootstrap auth flags stay file-driven. Mutable runtime settings are DB-backed.
radtrack-settings_cell_cache_refresh_ttl: Refresh aggregate cell cache TTL on read.
Refresh aggregate cell cache TTL on read
Cache hits reset aggregate cell cache TTL to {$seconds} seconds.
radtrack-auth_error-description: The backend rejected the current auth flow. Check provider config, linked identities, and upstream header auth policy.
radtrack-audit_description: Recent control-plane and ingest key events scoped to your account unless you are a moderator or admin.
radtrack-audit_has_more: Choose a larger limit or All to include older entries.
radtrack-track_description: Datalog detail, sharing, live ingest settings, and point editing.
radtrack-track_failed_restore_original: Failed to restore the uploaded original datalog.
radtrack-track_delete_confirm: Delete datalog "{$name}"? This removes every reading in it.
radtrack-track_keys_empty: No ingest keys have been created for this datalog yet.
radtrack-track_key_rotated: A new key was generated. The previous key is now revoked.
radtrack-track_metric_help: Fields defined on this datalog. Number and time fields can be plotted on the map. Text fields are popup-only.
radtrack-track_metric_autodetect_help: Autodetect appends missing keys from stored readings. It uses `measurements` for numbers and `components` for popup text. Nothing is saved until you click Update.
radtrack-track_metric_empty: No fields defined yet. Use Autodetect to append keys from stored readings, or create them manually.
radtrack-track_not_live: This datalog was created from an import and does not accept live ingest keys.
radtrack-track_plaintext_warning: Copy this key now. It is only shown once.
radtrack-track_restore_original_confirm: Restore datalog "{$name}" from the archived uploaded file? This replaces current edited points.
radtrack-track_sharing_empty: This datalog is not shared with anyone yet.
radtrack-track_sharing_help: Datalog shares can expose just this datalog without sharing the full dataset.
radtrack-track_special_props_help: Reserved keys: keep numeric data in measurements, popup text in components, and stored-only metadata in extra. RadTrack also exposes synthetic popup props at query time.
radtrack-track_sample_payload_descriptio: Use `measurements` for numeric values, `components` for popup text, and `extra` for stored-only metadata. The server records `receivedAt` when it accepts the payload.
